The '''Ice Piranha''' was a type of [[piranha]] found on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Ice Piranha appears in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' as one of the minor enemies the player character faces in the game's Hoth level.

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}
